description_long: This is a medium-sized, red bottle with a slightly textured surface and a cylindrical neck that tapers into a wider body. The front features a faded label with some visible text and graphics, suggesting it is a branded product, possibly a sauce or drink mix. The bottle has a screw cap that is beige or light brown in color, contrasting with the red body. The back and sides are mostly plain, with some subtle surface irregularities and a secondary, less legible label on the rear. The bottle appears to be made of plastic, with a matte finish and some signs of surface wear. Its overall form is ergonomic, designed for easy gripping and pouring.
description: A red, plastic bottle with a beige screw cap and a faded front label, showing signs of wear and a matte, textured surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main faded label and the beige screw cap, with the bottle's red color and some surface wear visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain red surface with subtle texture and no visible labels or markings.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a secondary, blurred label and the bottle's overall shape, with the cap and red body clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing a plain red surface with minor surface irregularities.
attribute_label_or_branding: Faded front label with partially legible text and graphics, mostly in dark colors on a lighter background; secondary blurred label on the back.
attribute_damage_or_deformation: Some surface wear and discoloration, but no major damage or deformation visible.
